name: builders-knowledge-garden
description: Construction codes, materials, safety, and CSI estimating for AI agents. Ask Claude about Marin energy code, OSHA fall protection, or your project's cost breakdown.
long_description: Builder's Knowledge Garden (BKG) is an AI operating system for general contractors. This extension connects Claude Desktop to the BKG MCP server, exposing 12 tools that query 40,000+ construction entities across 142+ jurisdictions: building codes, material specs, safety requirements, permit timelines, cost estimates, schedules, team composition, and CRM pipeline data. The server is hosted at builders.theknowledgegardens.com; this bundle is a thin stdio bridge.
